summary: Iteration 5 — 'Spese fornitura' (per-client material expenses) feature tested end-to-end. Backend: 41/41 pytest tests pass (10 new TestMaterials covering CRUD, persistence, source default, summary aggregation by source, materials_total + expected_margin in /clients/unpaid, balance formula = incassi-spese-advances-materials, isolation, edge cases). Frontend: full flow verified — register, create client with 2 materials (Tubolare 300€ contanti + Motore 120€ conto_aziendale), live total=420€/margin=580€, save, reopen-persistence, remove-row updates live, Agenda margin pill, Incassi margin pill, Riepilogo P&L line + dedicated Uscite card with source breakdown all show correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}' — non-blocking a11y warning. Add a DialogDescription or aria-describedby to all Radix Dialog/AlertDialog instances.

action_items: (Optional/minor) Add DialogDescription / aria-describedby to ClientFormDialog and other dialog components to silence Radix a11y console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:235 — `paid = to_collect` for legacy lavoro_eseguito with payment_method/invoice_number; correct, but consider documenting that this excludes the client from /clients/unpaid even when materials exist (materials still count in /summary, which matches spec).

Material.source uses Pydantic Literal['contanti','conto_aziendale']; an invalid string returns 422 (FastAPI default). Spec wording 'defaults to conto_aziendale if missing/null/invalid' is partially met (missing/null OK; invalid → 422 instead of coerce). Acceptable, but if frontend ever sends a stray value it will fail save — front-end MaterialsList uses a Select restricted to those 2 values, so safe in practice.
Riepilogo total materials renders with thin-space + minus glyph ('− 420,00 €') — purely cosmetic.
server.py is single-file (~580 lines); still under 700-line guideline but approaching split threshold as more features land.
test_credentials: Fresh Firebase signup per run via REACT_APP_FIREBASE_API_KEY: testuser+m<ts>@italserrande.test / TestPassword123! (also testuser+a<ts> / testuser+b<ts> for isolation tests).
seed_data_creation: All seeded data uses TEST_ prefix and is cleaned up in pytest finally blocks; frontend test client TEST_FE_Mat_Mario remains in the freshly created test user account (account itself is throwaway).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Existing /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers iterations 1-5 (auth gates, clients CRUD, expenses CRUD, advances CRUD, summary, isolation, search, advances-by-worker, recurring expenses + apply idempotency, unpaid clients, materials). All 41 pass. Materials feature: clients can have a `materials: [{description, amount, supplier?, source: 'contanti'|'conto_aziendale', date?, notes?}]` array; /summary returns total_materials + materials_by_source; /clients/unpaid returns materials_total + expected_margin per item; balance = total_incassi - total_spese - total_advances - total_materials. Frontend uses MaterialsList component inside ClientFormDialog. Margin pills (client-margin-<id>, incasso-margin-<id>) appear only when materialsTotal > 0. Riepilogo shows riepilogo-total-materials and riepilogo-materials-card with sub-source breakdown.
